parameters.//: Day 2 (Data) slim infrastructure parameters. Fill in the REPLACE_ME values, then run ./scripts/deploy-day2.ps1.
parameters.//location: Region for Fabric + SQL + Purview. Must support all three. Recommended: eastus2, swedencentral, westus3.
parameters.//fabric: Set enableFabricCapacity=false if your customer already has a Fabric capacity in the tenant.

fabricAdminObjectId.//: Entra Object ID of the user OR group that should be the Fabric capacity admin. Find with: az ad signed-in-user show --query id -o tsv

sqlAadAdminLogin.//: UPN of the Entra admin for the SQL server (Entra-only auth).

sqlAadAdminObjectId.//: Entra Object ID of the SQL admin (same person/group as sqlAadAdminLogin).
